chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-547 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.2922/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 03.03.2025 Mir Maula Bukhsh, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Shamshad Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent (S.R.B) has filed copy of withdrawal of notice, which reads as follows:- “Dated: 28th February, 2025 Mr.Taha Haroon, M/S Lone Star Corporation, SNTN: S1538873-5, Office No.403, 4th Floor, International Trade Centre, Adjacent: Karachi Chamber of Commerce & Industry, Hasrat Mohani Road, Karachi Mr.Taha Haroon House No.127, Khyaban-e-Ghazi, Phase VI, DHA, Karachi. Subject: WITHDRAWAL OF NOTICE NO.SRB-COM-III/AC- VII/C.A/2021-24/534335 DATED 15TH JANUARY, 2025 FOR RECOVERY OF THE SINDH SALES TAX Dear Sir, This is to inform you that notice bearing No.SRB-COM-III/AC- VII/C.A/2021-24/534335 DATED 15TH JANUARY, 2025 is hereby withdrawn without prejudice to the right of this office to initiate appropriate proceedings in accordance with law. Sd/- (Yousuf Ali Magsi) Assistant Commissioner (Unit-7) In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that this petition has served its purpose, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
